description: The briefingMutation and chatMutation both use fetchWithTimeout but the commute query uses standard useQuery without explicit timeout. This inconsistency means commute requests could hang indefinitely if the API stalls. Should wrap the commute API call in fetchWithTimeout or configure useQuery timeout.
successCriteria: All API requests in AIAssistant use consistent timeout handling (either all fetchWithTimeout or all useQuery with timeout config)
Commute query has a maximum wait time of 10 seconds before showing error
Timeout errors display actionable user guidance
